productDisplayName: Puma Men's Excitemo Black White Silver Shoe
description: Get ready to score fab goals with these puma Excitemo men's Soccer Cleats. The lightweight structure enables better control of the ball. Ultra-durable and lightweight, these cleats are designed for quick moves on the field and better performance. Upper Synthetic leather upper for a comfortable, durable Fit Asymmetrical lacing system for expanded ball control area Key points on the outsole have been enhanced for improved receiving and passing Dampening pods on the lateral side helps control the ball from the first touch Along the instep, a soft angled plate delivers friction to reduce ball spin and a hard plate helps with quick passes Midsole EVA sockliner for cushioning and to help reduce stud pressure Contoured sockliner at the midsole for cushioning to reduce stud pressure Outsole Lightweight outsole with optimized cleat placement for absolute traction, stability and durability Firm- ground (FG) cleats for use on short grass fields that may be slightly wet, but rarely muddy Durable TPU plate with strategically placed cleats that grip the ground and deliver reliable stability
